name: itsoltech-agents
description: ITSOL organization Claude Code plugins — shared commands, skills, agents, and configurable workflow modes

plugins.name: itsol-workflow
plugins.description: Workflow commands for PR/commit/spec workflows used across ITSOL projects

plugins.name: itsolpowers
plugins.description: ITSOL engineering skills and subagents with itsol-workflow-mode for governed, autonomous-planned, or direct execution, plus repo memory, current technology research, UI/UX, application migration, data access, TDD, security, infrastructure, review, debugging, OpenCode, and Pi
